home.label: pleasant ave / minneapolis home area (approx; exact address was not geocodable)

notes: exact 442 pleasant ave address did not geocode in Nominatim/Census; this uses a Pleasant Ave Minneapolis home-area approximation for drive-time filtering
initial dataset is public Gravelmap routes; surface percentages are source-estimated until OSM segment matching is added
coordinates are simplified GPX tracks from Gravelmap public GPX endpoints
